content.en:
"Let's go inside!"

A fivefold ancestor commanded.

Whew!!!

One by one, the Triple Ancestors entered this supreme treasure land through one portal after another.

However, just after the Triple Origin Ancestors of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain entered, an unimaginable majestic force descended, directly tearing the barrier of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and sending a group of people in.

"Look for death!"

The Fivefold Origin Ancestors of the Six Fivefold Holy Gates of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain were furious and directly launched an attack.

"Ahhh!!h

Some of the Triple Ancestors were directly affected and were annihilated in an instant.

However, there were still some Triple Origin Ancestors who had entered the Supreme Treasure Land and were mixed with the Triple Origin Ancestors of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and the Fivefold Origin Ancestors were unable to enter this treasure land, so they were unable to identify these Triple Ancestors.

Unless they infiltrate their power and kill all the three primordial ancestors inside, they will not be able to help them.

"Damn, they seized the opportunity and sent a batch of Triple Ancestors in, don't release them next!"

Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said coldly.

However.

At this moment, another majestic force easily disintegrated their power and sent several Triple Origin Ancestors inside.

At this moment, these fivefold ancestors didn't dare to stop it.

"Was that half-step sixfold ancestor just now?"

Feng Ming's original ancestor trembled.

"It should be, it is estimated that some ancient beings who are in seclusion happen to know the information here, and then send a few disciples in! Fortunately, these ancient beings are not interested in occupying this supreme treasure land, otherwise we will be in trouble!" said a fivefold ancestor.

Although it is not that there are no half-step six-fold ancestors in the Shangling Origin Domain, there are only a few, and no one knows how many half-step sixfold ancestors there are in the outside world!

If it really starts, it will definitely be difficult for them to occupy this place in the Spirit Origin Domain.

"I hope that half-step sixfold ancestor disciple isn't too powerful!"

Many Fivefold Ancestors thought to themselves.

......

The interior of the Supreme Treasure Land.

Ye Tian entered here, and immediately felt unimaginable energy and an extremely special environment.

Moreover, after a little probing of his will, he felt an extremely abundant resource!

"It's worthy of being a supreme treasure that the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor is extremely eager for, and any little benefit here is enough to make the Triple Primordial Ancestor crazy!" Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to an area and scraped away the resources here one by one, although there were not many resources that were useful to him, he didn't want to waste resources.

After all, he may only stay in such a place once, so he must be cleaned up!

Abrupt.

A swarm of creatures attacked him.

"It's the native creatures of this supreme treasure land!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

These native creatures lack inheritance, so they are not powerful, but their physical bodies are comparable to the top Triple Ancestors.

"Die!"

Ye Tian made a move, killed this group of creatures in an instant, and then left here directly.

For the next period of time, this supreme treasure was full of fighting, and in the face of the alien Triple Ancestor, the creatures here were naturally no match and were slaughtered in large numbers.

It didn't take long for the creatures here to become scarce and dare not come out again.

......

"The resources are too abundant!"

Ye Tian is so cool to collect resources.

Suddenly.

He sensed a treasure, a black flower with countless golden lines.

"Ten thousand golden flowers!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is a treasure that the Fivefold Ancestors of the Void Tooth Holy Gate need, and it occupies a relatively important position in the list listed by the Fivefold Ancestors.

If you get this treasure, when you go out, you need to give it to the Fivefold Ancestors, but you will also be rewarded by the Void Fang Holy Gate.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to this golden flower, and then used the power of the Golden Extreme Extreme Dao to wrap it, and then sealed it heavily, and then put it away.

This is the preservation method recorded on the list given by the Void Tooth Holy Gate, otherwise such a treasure, a random flower, the effect will drop dramatically.

But at this moment, a triple ancestor appeared.

"A Holy Son of the Nine Lights Holy Gate!"

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, it was called Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor.

Bai Yu Yuanzu saw Ye Tian, and without saying a word, he shot directly.

He knew all the very powerful Holy Sons of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and Ye Tian was very unfamiliar, although he also knew that Ye Tian was a Holy Son, but it should be because of the new Holy Son.

Therefore, he shot directly and prepared to kill Ye Tian.

After all, there is also a strength gap between the Holy Son and the Holy Son, and the powerful Holy Son can even kill the weaker Holy Son in seconds.

And as soon as Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor made a move, it was a holy art - the golden light from the dust!

"It's a golden light from the dust!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Immediately, he directly released the glazed holy cover, blocking the blow.

Although he can resist physically and will not be injured, he is still low-key at first.

After all, if this Bai Yu Origin Ancestor died, his body would leak his news to the Nine Lights Holy Gate, so it was better to hide his strength for the time being.

"What, Glass Shield!"

Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor was shocked.

And at this time, Ye Tian cast the Void Blade and attacked him.

With just one blow, Bai Yu Yuanzu was directly injured.

"Run!"

Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor was very simply ready to escape.

After all, he can't kill Ye Tian, he is not an opponent yet, there is no need to fight Ye Tian!

However, Ye Tian didn't want to let him go.

Swish!

The ten-sided sword realm was shrouded, and one after another Void Blade attacked.

Seeing that the injuries on his body were getting more and more serious, Bai Yu Yuanzu was angry, and he was about to play a hole card.

But at this time, Ye Tian directly cast the Taichu Fist, and he was instantaneous.

The next moment.

Ye Tianyi grabbed a jade plate.

"There's a power sealed inside, if it erupts from Bai Yu's original ancestor, it should be enough to kill the ordinary Holy Son in an instant! However, it's not much of a threat to me. Ye Tian muttered.

However, he was still a little careful and couldn't give Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor any chance, so he directly used the Taichu Fist to kill him in seconds.

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

"Damn, I was killed!"

Bai Yu Yuanzu said angrily.

He had just entered this supreme treasure land, and with his strength, he was killed so quickly, and it was estimated that he was the first Holy Son of the Nine Lights Holy Gate to be killed.

That's a shame!

"I also have to inform the other Holy Sons to be careful of that Holy Son, it seems to be the new Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate!"

Bai Yu Yuan Ancestor muttered.

Soon, the other Holy Sons of the Nine Light Holy Gate all knew about Ye Tian's existence, but they didn't care, they only thought that Bai Yu's original ancestor was too vegetable, so he was killed by the other Holy Sons.

In this regard, Bai Yu Shengzi was very helpless, but there was no way to explain it.
